oads This is Diva 0.3 . Diva 0.3 is the third public release of Diva. This release consolidates the infrastructure introduced in the first release (the "hard-hat" release). We are still developing the infrastructure, but the canvas and graph packages

infrastructure, but the canvas and graph packages are approaching stability. This is the first release of the sketch package, so it should be considered "hard-hat" for this release. Browse the Diva release FIXME: It seems to say diva 0.2? diva-0.3.j
